title: Container queries
description: Adapt to a parent's size, not the viewport.

questions.prompt: container-type: inline-size on a parent enables:
options: Its children to query the parent's width
questions.explanation: Marks the element as a query container.
That's the whole point — the CONTAINER determines it, not the viewport.

options: Reusable components can adapt to their slot
questions.explanation: The same card can look wide in a hero and narrow in a sidebar without global media queries.

options: Name the container so children can target a specific ancestor

questions.explanation: 1cqw = 1% of the container's inline size — great for fluid children.
